response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering, system architecture, and performance optimization (e.g., low-latency apps, robotic arms), his background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and embedded systems rather than hardware optimization for AI accelerators or SoC/IP modeling. His exposure to deep learning is minimal (AI-agent infrastructure work), and he lacks direct experience with GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, or hardware-software co-design. His educational background (BSc in Computer Science) does not meet the preferred PhD/Master's requirement for this principal-level role.
strengths: Strong system-level software engineering and performance optimization experience (e.g., low-latency apps, robotic arms with Dlang/Java).
Proven ability to work across the stack (TypeScript, C++, DLang, Java) and deliver high-performance solutions.
Experience with CI/CD, testing methodologies (TDD), and dev-ops infrastructure setup.
concerns: No direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator hardware optimization.
Lacks the preferred advanced degree (PhD/Master's) or sufficient years of experience for a principal-level role in this specialized field.
Limited exposure to deep neural network training/inference optimization or SIMD/MIMD architectures.
